title: grewia hierniana
intro: Grewia hierniana, also known as the African boxwood or Boxwood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of a decoction, infusion, or ointment, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
